The Milor Experience

A Curated Day

9:00 AM

VIP Welcome

Your dog arrives by name. Favorite treats served immediately.

10:30 AM

Play Session

Supervised play with dogs sharing temperament and energy.

1:00 PM

Wellness Break

Massage, grooming, or spa while parents enjoy the lounge.

3:00 PM

Gourmet Tasting

Chef-prepared meals tailored to each dog's nutritional profile.

5:00 PM

Rest Time

Soothing music, softest beds, a gentle wind-down.

6:00 PM

Pick Up

A happy reunion. Tomorrow is already reserved.

For Dog Parents

Stay, Work
& Socialize

While your dog enjoys the club, you're welcome to stay as long as you like. Milor House is designed for you too.

French Pâtisserie

Freshly baked pastries, croissants and artisan coffee served daily.

Juice Bar

Cold-pressed juices, smoothies and wellness shots crafted fresh.

Work Lounge

Private desks, high-speed wifi and a quiet space to focus.

Petworking

Connect with like-minded members who share your love of dogs.

From Luxury to Longevity

Our Proactive
Health Center

We partner exclusively with MULTIWAVE© to deploy the first AI-powered MRI ecosystem dedicated to canine longevity.

  • ✦AI Proprietary Diagnostics & Vitality Score
  • ✦Preventive MRI — 24 months early detection
  • ✦Longevity Protocols & Nutrition Roadmaps
  • ✦Full Veterinary Services On-Site

Exclusive Membership

Membership
That Makes Sense

At MILOR, we offer memberships designed for pet parents who expect excellence.

One-time Initiation Fee: $5,000 — your $1,000 deposit is fully deducted.

/ month

/ month

Terms & Conditions

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing milor.dog and paying a reservation deposit, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions and all applicable laws and regulations in the State of Florida.

2. Reservation Deposit

The $1,000 deposit secures your founding membership spot and is fully deducted from the $5,000 initiation fee. Refundable within 14 days of payment, or if the club fails to open within 36 months.
